summary: Retargeted the task 1280 review obligation from the auto-routed operator reviewer row to the builder role.
reason: Operator direction: operator is not assignable to review; builder-role review obligations must be consumable by narada.builder.

preventive_change.summary: Report-time auto routing now prefers a distinct builder with admitted review authority before reviewer-role fallback and excludes the operator row from fallback reviewer auto-routing.
